title: Sagma (disambiguation)
content:
'''Sagma''' may refer to one of the following:

*The '''[[Sagma system/Legends|Sagma system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Illisurevimurasi sector/Legends|Illisurevimurasi sector]]
*The '''[[Battle of Sagma]]''' of the [[Listehol Campaign]] of the [[Reconquest of the Rim]]
*A [[Battle of the Sagma system|'''battle''']] in the Sagma system during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]

{{Disambig}}
